@graph.name: Business Infinity — Innovation vs. Maintenance Deadlock
@graph.description: R&D stagnation — the 'Maintenance Tax' eats the Innovation Budget. Engineers spend 80% on refactoring the refactor.

offers.name: The Digital Vanguard Agent — Chief Technology Officer
offers.description: The Digital Vanguard agent (Chief Technology Officer) addresses innovation vs. maintenance deadlock through the innovation_velocity workflow.

@graph.name: The Entropy Index — Innovation vs. Maintenance Deadlock
@graph.description: R&D stagnation — the 'Maintenance Tax' eats the Innovation Budget. Engineers spend 80% on refactoring the refactor.

mainEntity.name: Engineering velocity dropping as team size increases

acceptedAnswer.text: Turing would observe that velocity drops because communication overhead grows quadratically while value creation grows linearly. The fix is not process improvement — it is a governance layer that eliminates the coordination tax.

Technical debt is the compound interest of deferred decisions. Every year it is not addressed, it costs more to service. A spec-driven boardroom prevents debt at the source by enforcing structured decision-making.

mainEntity.name: Why is my R&D budget growing but my feature release cycle slowing down

acceptedAnswer.text: Growing budgets with slowing cycles is the classic symptom of the Maintenance Tax. Your engineers are spending 80% on 'keeping the lights on' and 20% on innovation. A boardroom that eliminates coordination overhead inverts that ratio.

mainEntity.name: Measuring developer toil vs. feature delivery

acceptedAnswer.text: Toil is the work that scales linearly with system size and contributes zero business value. The Digital Vanguard agent would measure it as the ratio of maintenance commits to feature commits. A boardroom tracks this in real time.

mainEntity.name: Why is my R&D efficiency dropping as I hire more seniors?

acceptedAnswer.text: Senior engineers hired into a system with no governance spend most of their time navigating complexity rather than applying expertise. The fix is not better hiring — it is a system that eliminates the navigation overhead.

mainEntity.name: How to align engineering specs with current component availability in real-time

acceptedAnswer.text: A design choice in the PLM that creates a 52-week lead time in the SCM is not engineering — it is legacy thinking. The Prime Visionary and COO agent pair bridges PLM and SCM data to maintain product launch integrity.

mainEntity.name: Why is our new product launch delayed by 6 months if R&D finished the design on time?

acceptedAnswer.text: The delay is in the gap between design (PLM) and sourcing (SCM). R&D designed a masterpiece that the supply chain cannot build on time. A boardroom that reads both systems catches this mismatch before the 6-month delay begins.

mainEntity.name: How to measure 'Managerial Bloat' in a 100-person startup

acceptedAnswer.text: Managerial bloat is the ratio of coordination labor to value-creating labor. When every decision requires a meeting, your managers have become overhead. The Digital Vanguard agent would measure this as the entropy of your communication graph.

mainEntity.name: Founder burnout and the loss of creative vision

acceptedAnswer.text: Burnout destroys the creative faculty first. When the founder stops dreaming and starts firefighting, the company loses the one thing no hire can replace. A boardroom that handles the firefighting returns the founder to their craft.
